description_long: This is a retro-style portable boombox radio receiver, predominantly light blue in color, featuring a rectangular body with rounded edges. The front face is equipped with two large circular black speaker grilles, a central cassette tape deck, and an array of control knobs, buttons, and sliders for tuning and playback. Two telescopic metal antennas extend from the top, and a sturdy handle is integrated for easy carrying. The sides have vented panels, likely for heat dissipation, while the back is mostly flat with molded details and no visible controls. The surface is glossy and hard, with plastic as the main material, accented by metallic and rubber components for the antennas and speaker grilles.
description: A light blue retro boombox radio receiver with dual black speakers, a central cassette deck, control knobs, and twin metal antennas on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual black speaker grilles, cassette deck, control panel, and extended antennas.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying vented panel and the depth of the radio receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view with a flat, molded surface and no visible controls or features.
description_view_3: Right side view with a vented panel, mirroring the left side.
